parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'sonar-pro', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Research the company "' + ($json.apolloData.company_name ?? $json.email.split('@')[1].split('.')[0]) + '" for sales intelligence. ' + ($json.apolloData.industry ? 'Industry: ' + $json.apolloData.industry + '. ' : '') + ($json.apolloData.headquarters ? 'HQ: ' + $json.apolloData.headquarters + '. ' : '') + 'Provide: recent hiring signals, product launches, growth indicators, funding news, and intent signals suggesting they need revenue operations tooling. Be concise and factual.' }], max_tokens: 600 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { email: $json.email, company: $json.enriched.company_name ?? '', industry: $json.enriched.industry ?? '', numberofemployees: $json.enriched.employee_count ? String($json.enriched.employee_count) : '', annualrevenue: $json.enriched.annual_revenue ? String($json.enriched.annual_revenue) : '', hs_lead_status: $json.score.vip_tier === 'VIP' ? 'IN_PROGRESS' : 'NEW', lifecyclestage: 'lead', vip_score: String($json.score.vip_score), vip_tier: $json.score.vip_tier, funding_stage: $json.enriched.funding_stage ?? '', solen_recommended_action: $json.score.recommended_action ?? '' } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'email', operator: 'EQ', value: $('Parse Score').first().json.email }] }], properties: ['email'], limit: 1 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { email: $('Parse Score').first().json.email, company: $('Parse Score').first().json.enriched.company_name ?? '', vip_score: String($('Parse Score').first().json.score.vip_score), vip_tier: $('Parse Score').first().json.score.vip_tier, hs_lead_status: $('Parse Score').first().json.score.vip_tier === 'VIP' ? 'IN_PROGRESS' : 'NEW', solen_recommended_action: $('Parse Score').first().json.score.recommended_action ?? '' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ attachments: [{ color: $('Parse Score').first().json.score.vip_tier === 'VIP' ? '#7c3aed' : $('Parse Score').first().json.score.vip_tier === 'High' ? '#2563eb' : $('Parse Score').first().json.score.vip_tier === 'Medium' ? '#d97706' : '#6b7280', blocks: [{ type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: ($('Parse Score').first().json.score.vip_tier === 'VIP' ? '🔥' : $('Parse Score').first().json.score.vip_tier === 'High' ? '⚡' : $('Parse Score').first().json.score.vip_tier === 'Medium' ? '📊' : '📋') + ' New ' + $('Parse Score').first().json.score.vip_tier + ' Lead — ' + ($('Parse Score').first().json.enriched.company_name ?? $('Parse Score').first().json.email.split('@')[1] ?? 'Unknown'), emoji: true } }, { type: 'section', fields: [{ type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Email:*
' + $('Parse Score').first().json.email }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*VIP Score:*
' + $('Parse Score').first().json.score.vip_score + '/100 (' + $('Parse Score').first().json.score.vip_tier + ')' }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Company:*
' + ($('Parse Score').first().json.enriched.company_name ?? 'Unknown') }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Employees:*
' + ($('Parse Score').first().json.enriched.employee_count ?? 'Unknown') }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Industry:*
' + ($('Parse Score').first().json.enriched.industry ?? 'Unknown') }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Funding:*
' + ($('Parse Score').first().json.enriched.funding_stage ?? 'Unknown') }] }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Score Rationale:*
' + ($('Parse Score').first().json.score.score_rationale ?? 'N/A') } }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Recommended Action:*
' + ($('Parse Score').first().json.score.recommended_action ?? 'N/A') } }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Email Draft Subject:*
' + ($('Parse Score').first().json.score.outreach_draft?.subject ?? 'N/A') } }, { type: 'divider' }] }] }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, email: $('Parse Score').first().json.email, enrichment: $('Parse Score').first().json.enriched, null_fields_patched: $('Parse Score').first().json.null_fields_patched, research: $('Parse Score').first().json.perplexityData, score: $('Parse Score').first().json.score, slack_sent: $json.body === 'ok', pipeline_latency_ms: Date.now() - $('Validate Email').first().json.pipelineStart }) }}
